prompt:
A close-up of an aquarium glass pane with a stick-on strip thermometer after the surface has dried, showing a stable temperature indication via a highlighted color segment (no readable numerals). The shot includes a hint of the waterline and blurred plants behind the glass to anchor it as an aquarium context, plus a soft microfiber cloth or paper towel nearby to suggest the “dry and stabilized” step.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a clean near-future solarpunk maintenance aesthetic: soft, diffused lighting, realistic glass reflections, no logos, no readable markings, and no on-image text. Keep the thermometer strip as the clear focal point, framed simply for icon clarity.
